title: Mukesh Kumar Choudhary joins Unity Small Finance Bank as National Head Legal
description: Mukesh Kumar Choudhary has been appointed as the National Head - Legal (Litigation & Non-litigation), Business Banking Group, at Unity Small Finance Bank.Choudhary is a 2007 graduate of Rani Durgavati Vishwavidyalaya, Jabalpur.With nearly two decades of experience in the Banking & Finance sector, Choudhary has held legal leadership roles across multiple leading establishments. He has extensive experience in handling litigation, mortgage due diligence and transactional support, arbitratio
